FOR APPROVAL
1.CIRCUIT BREAKERS ARE EQUIPPED WITH 3 DRIVES FOR 3 PHASES.2.DISCONNECTORS/EARTHING SWITCHES WITH 1 DRIVE FOR 3PHASES.3.HSES WITH 3 CLOSING SPRINGS / 3 CHARGING  MOTOR FOR 3PHASES.4.EACH GAS COMPARTMENT IS EQUIPPED WITH ONE GAS VALVE,ONE DENSITY MONITOR, ONE PRESSURE RELIEF DEVICE ANDADSORBENT.5.TOTAL VOLUME OF SF6 GAS IN ONE TIGHT COMPARTMENTS WILLBE < 4m³ AS PER i) 32-TMSS-02 REV.02 ITEM 4.9.1.c.                                       ii) 32-TMSS-05 REV.01 ITEM 4.1.146.GAS COMP. WITH HIGH PRESSURE CONTACT (BD..*)7.ALL GAS COMPARTMENT PRESSURE WILL BEMEASURED/INDICATED IN THE UNIT OF kPA.8.HUMIDITY ABSORBERS (FILTERS) ARE INSERTED IN ALL GASCOMPARTMENTS.9.FINAL QUANTI
